creator: patovm04@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #8)
It's been good speed-wise and also very stable. The only (and very relevant) issue is the kernel panic when restarting netif, and the connection loss after resuming from suspend...
As I have a laptop, I think I'm gonna end having to go back to wifibox for a while till these problems are fixed.
But so far the improvements are very noticeable and I wish you the best going forward!
I will test it again in the near future. Cheers.
